signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
Prediction markets currently assign a **36.2% probability** to Dogecoin (DOGE) reaching $0.16 by December 31, 2026, requiring a +73.2% price increase from recent levels within 266 days.[1] This is more optimistic than the historical base rate of 16.4%, with only 76 of 463 similar 266-day periods achieving such a move.[1]

**Current DOGE status**: As of early 2026 reports, DOGE trades around **$0.15** (up 5.34% in the past 24 hours), with neutral RSI at 57.69 indicating room for upside before ove
